meaning: /n.函授 principle//n.对 school//n.函授/n.相应,通信,信件/纬
examples: We have been in correspondence for months.
We kept up a correspondence for many years.
I took a correspondence course in computing.
Correspondence kept by the hospital reveals that aged 67 he was still a patient.
The museum stresses the value of the newly-bought letters as "genuine correspondence between artists".
